{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan King Regent
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan King Regent]] will not aid the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
